subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! The whole world hath been and is from God, and God, glorified be His majesty, hath trained all the peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسن جمیع عالم از حق بوده و هست و حق جل جلاله جمیع اهل ارض را تربیت فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for prosperity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
